messages.content: Use jira_search_issues to find the open P0 bugs in the PAY project, then use jira_add_comment to add "fix is rolling out today" to each of them, and tell me which issue keys you commented on.

function.name: github_create_issue
function.description: Create a new issue in a GitHub repository. Supports labels, assignees and a markdown body. Returns the created issue number and html_url.

owner.description: Repository owner — a user or organization login.

repo.description: Repository name without the owner prefix.

title.description: Issue title, plain text, at most 256 characters.

labels.description: Label names to apply; each label must already exist in the repository.

assignees.description: GitHub logins to assign, up to 10.

function.name: github_list_issues
function.description: List issues in a repository with optional filtering by state, labels and assignee. Results are paginated, newest first.

labels.description: Only issues carrying ALL of these label names.

assignee.description: Only issues assigned to this login; use "none" for unassigned.

function.name: github_get_issue
function.description: Fetch a single issue including its body, labels, assignees, milestone and reaction counts. Does not include the comment thread.

issue_number.description: The issue number as shown in the issue URL.

function.name: github_create_pull_request
function.description: Open a pull request from a head branch into a base branch. Optionally create it as a draft. Returns the PR number and diff stats.

head.description: The branch with your changes, e.g. "feat/retry-budget". Cross-fork heads use "fork-owner:branch".

base.description: The branch you want to merge into, usually the default branch.

body.description: PR description as markdown; supports closing keywords like "Fixes #123".

draft.description: Create as a draft PR that cannot be merged until marked ready.

function.name: github_list_pull_requests
function.description: List pull requests with optional state and base-branch filters. Includes mergeability and review-decision summaries.

base.description: Only PRs targeting this base branch.

function.name: github_merge_pull_request
function.description: Merge an open pull request using the given merge method. Fails if required checks or reviews are not satisfied.

commit_title.description: Override for the merge-commit title (squash/merge only).

function.name: github_get_file_contents
function.description: Read a file (or list a directory) at a ref. File content is returned base64-encoded with its size and blob SHA.

path.description: Path to the file or directory from the repo root.

ref.description: Branch, tag or commit SHA; defaults to the default branch.

function.name: github_search_code
function.description: Search code across repositories with the GitHub code-search syntax. Returns matching fragments with file path and repository.

function.name: github_create_branch
function.description: Create a new branch pointing at the same commit as the given source ref.

branch.description: Name for the new branch, without "refs/heads/".

from_ref.description: Source branch, tag or SHA the new branch starts from; defaults to the default branch.

function.name: slack_send_message
function.description: Post a message to a Slack channel as the connected bot. Supports mrkdwn formatting and threading.

text.description: Message text; Slack mrkdwn is rendered.

thread_ts.description: Timestamp of a parent message to reply in its thread.

unfurl_links.description: Whether Slack should unfurl URLs in the message.

function.name: slack_list_channels
function.description: List public (and joined private) channels in the workspace with id, name, topic and member count.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response.

function.name: slack_get_channel_history
function.description: Fetch recent messages from a channel, newest first, including thread parents and reaction summaries.

oldest.description: Only messages after this Unix timestamp.

function.name: slack_add_reaction
function.description: Add an emoji reaction to an existing message.

timestamp.description: Timestamp (ts) of the message to react to.

function.name: slack_upload_file
function.description: Upload a file to one or more channels with an optional initial comment.

channel_ids.description: Channel IDs that receive the file.

file_path.description: Local path of the file to upload.

function.name: slack_search_messages
function.description: Search workspace messages with Slack search modifiers (from:, in:, before:). Returns matches with permalinks.

query.description: Search query, e.g. "deploy failed in:#incidents after:2026-06-01".

function.name: jira_search_issues
function.description: Search Jira issues with a JQL query. Returns key, summary, status, priority, assignee and labels for each match.

jql.description: JQL query, e.g. "project = PAY AND priority = P0 AND statusCategory != Done".

fields.description: Issue fields to include; defaults to a compact summary set.

function.name: jira_get_issue
function.description: Fetch one issue by key with its description, status, priority, assignee, labels and linked issues.

function.name: jira_create_issue
function.description: Create a new Jira issue in a project. Returns the new issue key.

description.description: Issue description; Atlassian document format or plain text.

labels.description: Labels to set on the new issue.

function.name: jira_add_comment
function.description: Add a comment to an existing issue. Plain text or Atlassian document format.

issue_key.description: Issue key to comment on, e.g. "PAY-1432".

body.description: Comment body; plain text is accepted and converted.

function.name: jira_transition_issue
function.description: Move an issue through its workflow (e.g. To Do -> In Progress -> Done) by transition name or id.

transition.description: Transition name or numeric id; must be valid from the current status.

resolution.description: Resolution to set when the transition closes the issue.

function.name: jira_assign_issue
function.description: Assign an issue to a user, or pass null to unassign.

account_id.description: Atlassian account id of the assignee; null clears the assignee.

function.name: jira_list_sprints
function.description: List sprints on a board with their state and date range.

function.name: pg_query
function.description: Run a read-only SQL query against the connected database and return rows as JSON. Statements that write are rejected.

sql.description: A single read-only SQL statement. Use $1, $2 placeholders with params.

params.description: Positional parameter values for the placeholders.

row_limit.description: Hard cap on returned rows, default 500.

function.name: pg_list_schemas
function.description: List schemas in the connected database with owner and comment.

function.name: pg_list_tables
function.description: List tables and views in a schema with row-count estimates.

include_views.description: Also list views and materialized views, default true.

function.name: pg_describe_table
function.description: Describe a table: columns with types and nullability, primary key, indexes, and foreign keys.

function.name: pg_explain_query
function.description: Run EXPLAIN (ANALYZE off) on a statement and return the plan tree with cost estimates.

sql.description: The SQL statement to explain; it is planned but never executed.

function.name: browser_navigate
function.description: Navigate the controlled browser tab to a URL and wait for the load event.

url.description: Absolute URL to open, including the scheme.

wait_until.description: Lifecycle event to wait for before returning.

function.name: browser_click
function.description: Click an element identified by a selector or accessible name. Scrolls it into view first.

selector.description: CSS selector or "text=Visible label" locator for the element.

function.name: browser_type_text
function.description: Type text into an input, textarea or contenteditable element, optionally submitting with Enter.

selector.description: Locator of the element to type into.

press_enter.description: Press Enter after typing, default false.

delay_ms.description: Delay between keystrokes in milliseconds, default 0.

function.name: browser_screenshot
function.description: Capture a screenshot of the page or one element and return it as base64 PNG.

selector.description: Optional locator; when set, captures just that element.

full_page.description: Capture the full scrollable page, default false.

function.name: browser_get_console_logs
function.description: Return console messages collected since the last navigation, with level and source location.

function.name: browser_wait_for
function.description: Wait until a selector appears/disappears or a fixed time passes.

selector.description: Locator to wait for; omit to wait a fixed time.

state.description: Condition to wait for on the selector.

function.name: browser_go_back
function.description: Navigate back one entry in the tab history, like the browser back button.

wait_until.description: Lifecycle event to wait for before returning.

function.name: browser_snapshot
function.description: Return an accessibility-tree snapshot of the page (roles, names, values) for element discovery without pixels.

interesting_only.description: Prune nodes that carry no semantics, default true.

function.name: fs_read_file
function.description: Read a file from the sandboxed workspace and return its contents as UTF-8 text.

path.description: Path relative to the workspace root.

max_bytes.description: Truncate the result after this many bytes, default 1048576.

function.name: fs_write_file
function.description: Create or overwrite a file in the workspace with the given UTF-8 content. Parent directories are created.

path.description: Path relative to the workspace root.

create_only.description: Fail instead of overwriting when the file exists, default false.

function.name: fs_list_directory
function.description: List entries of a workspace directory with type and size.

path.description: Directory path relative to the workspace root; "." for the root.

function.name: fs_search_files
function.description: Search file contents in the workspace with a regular expression; returns path, line number and the matching line.

pattern.description: Regular expression to search for (RE2 syntax).

glob.description: Limit the search to paths matching this glob, e.g. "src/**/*.ts".

function.name: fs_move_file
function.description: Move or rename a file or directory inside the workspace.

destination.description: New path; parent directories are created.

overwrite.description: Replace the destination if it exists, default false.

function.name: fs_get_file_info
function.description: Return metadata for a path: size, mtime, mode and whether it is a file, directory or symlink.

path.description: Path relative to the workspace root.
